seoTitle: Marks Point vs Markwell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marks Point and Markwell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Marks Point vs Markwell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marks Point and Markwell.
heading: Marks Point vs Markwell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marks Point, New South Wales and Markwell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Markwell has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Marks Point (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marks Point or Markwell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marks Point has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Markwell scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marks Point scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Markwell scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marks Point or Markwell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Markwell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
